## Summary

Describe the focused change and the user problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall -q launcher.py src tests`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No hardware data is transmitted.
- [ ] No download or installation occurs without explicit approval.
- [ ] New network sources use HTTPS and the trusted allowlist.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data are included.

## Documentation

- [ ] User-facing behavior and commands are documented when applicable.
